title: Compensation by agreement
doc_html:
Art. 1901.  Compensation by agreement

Compensation of obligations may take place also by agreement of the parties even though the requirements for compensation by operation of law are not met.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
